seoTitle: Tirroan vs Tocal — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tirroan and Tocal. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tirroan and Tocal.
heading: Tirroan vs Tocal — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tirroan, Queensland and Tocal, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tocal has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Tirroan (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tirroan or Tocal safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tirroan has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Tocal scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tirroan scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Tocal scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tirroan or Tocal?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tocal has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
